pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-T-006 (Core Abilities/Task) scores 0.406 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.406). Scope is edge_case for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Core Abilities, composite 0.406. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Core Abilities for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Core Abilities appears in ~40% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer postings as a secondary competency. Analytical and documentation abilities appear implicitly across SaMD QRA requirements. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Core Abilities without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
